comparators.random_iid_projected: iid standard-normal T x 8 sequences projected to the same L2 ball

disturbance_channel.budget: flattened rollout L2 ball from run_spec hps.broad_epsilon_training
disturbance_channel.injection: mechanics.epsilon through C&S LSS B_w[:8, :] = I_8

limits.full_b8aa38e_matrix_cost: CLI defaults intentionally smoke one row; pass multiple --run-id values for the full row set because each row loads checkpoints and runs PGD through frozen GRU rollouts.

optimizer.objective: mean realized full Q/R/Q_f rollout cost over selected replicates/trials

target_relative_alignment.radial_axis: target_position - base_position at each time step
